wines.name: Chateau Lajarre Bordeaux Superieur 2023
sources: varietal inference: Bordeaux Superieur — Right Bank Merlot-dominant blend, firm tannins, 13-13.5% ABV

wines.name: The Horologist Sauvignon Blanc 2024
sources: varietal inference: NZ Sauvignon Blanc — zippy, high acidity, 12.5-13% ABV

wines.name: Domaine Laroque Cite de Carcassonne Chardonnay 2023
sources: varietal inference: Languedoc Chardonnay — partial oak, medium body, 13% ABV

wines.name: Domaine Laroque Cite de Carcassonne Pinot Noir 2023
sources: varietal inference: Languedoc Pinot Noir — light-bodied, red berry, 12.5-13% ABV

wines.name: Chateau Montaud Cotes de Provence Rose 2024
sources: varietal inference: Cotes de Provence Rosé — dry Grenache-Cinsault, light body, 13% ABV

wines.name: Jadix Cabernet Sauvignon 2023
sources: varietal inference: Pays d'Oc Cabernet Sauvignon — firm, dark fruit, 13.5-14% ABV

wines.name: La Marca Prosecco NV
sources: varietal inference: Prosecco Extra Dry (La Marca) — off-dry with 12-17g/L RS, 11% ABV

wines.name: Ziobaffa Organic Pinot Grigio 2024
sources: varietal inference: Puglia Pinot Grigio — warmer, fuller body, 12.5-13% ABV

wines.name: BenMarco Malbec
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/benmarco-malbec-2022/2669489 — ABV 14.5% confirmed
James Suckling 93: 'medium to full body and tightly wound tannins. Fresh, pristine'
Vinous 91: 'vibrant purple... expressive fruit... slightly rough tannins characteristic of Los Chacayes'
Wine Spectator 90: 'Prominent acidity and minerality'

wines.name: CVNE Rioja Reserva
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/cvne-rioja-reserva-2020/2609673 — ABV 14% confirmed
James Suckling 92: 'medium-bodied palate with juicy, plummy fruit and fine-grained tannins'
Robert Parker 91: 'abundant, fine, slightly dusty tannins... good freshness and balance'
Wine Spectator 91: 'integrates creamy-edged tannins and orange peel acidity'

wines.name: Frescobaldi Nipozzano Chianti Rufina Riserva
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/frescobaldi-nipozzano-chianti-rufina-riserva-2022/3871328 — ABV 13.5% confirmed (boundary rounds up to alcohol 4)
James Suckling 92: 'Medium-bodied with very fine tannins and crispness giving it tension and brightness'
Wine Spectator 90: 'solid tannins and bright acidity for support'
Vinous 90: 'soft, open-knit... plush contours'

wines.name: Bodegas Luzon Verde
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/bodegas-luzon-verde-2024/3985068 — ABV 14% confirmed
Wine Enthusiast 91: 'relaxed tannins that bolster the bottling'
Wilfred Wong 91: 'supple, rounded texture... generous dark berry flavors... touch of richness'

wines.name: Chalk Hill Sonoma Coast Chardonnay
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/chalk-hill-sonoma-coast-chardonnay-2024/3485964 — ABV 14.5% confirmed (boundary rounds up to alcohol 5)
James Suckling 93: 'mouth-filling, weighty, full-bodied wine. Generous and satisfying'
Tasting Panel 93: 'body and weight but is lively and bright; the oak is merely a whisper'

wines.name: Ceretto Arneis Blange
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/ceretto-arneis-blange-2023/3395102 — ABV 13% confirmed
Wine Enthusiast 91: 'lively mix of juicy pear and a hint of almond'
James Suckling 90: 'focused, medium-bodied white... lemon rind, almond and white pear. Nicely compact and lightly chalky'

wines.name: Catena Appellation Lujan de Cuyo White Clay Semillon-Chenin Blanc
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/catena-appellation-lujan-de-cuyo-white-clay-semillon-chenin-blanc-2024/3648036 — ABV not listed on page
inference: Catena high-altitude Luján de Cuyo whites typically 13–13.5% ABV; scoring at 13% (alcohol 3) without confirmation
James Suckling 94: 'medium- to full-bodied, crunchy and textured... persistent freshness'
Wine Spectator 91: 'vibrant acidity, crushed rock and salt drive the palate'
Robert Parker 91: 'oily and rich before transitioning to a vibrant, succulent and gently tensile finish'

wines.name: Miraval Rose
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/miraval-rose-2024/3036255 — ABV 13% confirmed
James Suckling 92: 'medium-bodied palate is sleek and finely textured, driven by bright acidity and highlighted by a clear mineral backbone'
Decanter 92: 'Fresh, crisp and mineral, with silky red berry fruit'
Robert Parker 90: 'moderately weighted, juicy and round wine with lot of energy'

wines.name: Marchesini Marcello Chiaretto di Bardolino Classico Rose
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/marchesini-marcello-chiaretto-di-bardolino-classico-rose-2023/3878672 — ABV 13.5% confirmed (boundary rounds up to alcohol 4)
Wine Enthusiast 93: 'tart red fruits... serious depth and structure with a texture that fills every corner of your mouth'
Winemaker notes: 'Full bodied flavor and structure... full bodied and lingering'

wines.name: Crios de Susana Balbo Rose of Malbec
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/crios-de-susana-balbo-rose-of-malbec-2024/3376590 — ABV 13.5% confirmed (boundary rounds up to alcohol 4)
Vinous 90: 'dry and taut, with medium tension and a lightly malic profile'
Wilfred Wong 90: 'bright, tart red fruit flavors and a lively, zesty finish'

wines.name: Gruet Brut
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/gruet-brut/12333 — ABV 12% confirmed
Wine Spectator 90: 'crisp, layered flavors of lime and mineral'
Tasting Panel 91: 'fresh, juicy, and clean with a tangy style'
inference: traditional method (méthode champenoise, 24 months on tirage) drives acidity to 5 — Champagne-equivalent production method

wines.name: Mionetto Prosecco Brut
sources: https://www.wine.com/product/mionetto-prosecco-brut/114238 — ABV 11% confirmed
Wine Enthusiast 90: 'zippy palate... loads of fresh apples and a touch of minerality'
Winemaker notes: 'well-balanced acidity provides a fresh and lively mouthfeel with a clean dry finish'
